rationale: In the citing paper, Gielens et al. (2008) is cited as support for interpreting event-study stock reactions as a forward-looking estimate of long-term firm value. The citation appears in methodological justification of the performance metric, not as a paper-specific theory, mechanism, or empirical benchmark that the authors build on directly. The hypotheses, contingency framework, and core analyses do not rely on the Wal-Mart entry study's substantive constructs or findings.
